narrative.premise: She was only tidying up for a second, then paused because of planner.
microPlot: She was only moving through an ordinary routine.
One specific detail briefly pulled her attention sideways.
The feeling did not grow into drama; it just settled for a moment.
narrative.sensoryFocus: 一个真实的生活片段，在路过时被捕捉。
narrative.emotionalLanding: A tiny detail made her pause internally for half a beat.

world_state: Weekend browsing traffic is slightly denser around the entrance shelves than on an ordinary weekday.
